channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: US forces attack and seize Iranian ship Touska near Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US Central Command has published a video said to show a guided-missile destroyer firing at an Iranian-flagged ship.

item.title: Argentina’s Milei backs US-Israel war on Iran in Jerusalem visit
item.description: Argentina’s president reaffirmed alignment with the US and Israel during a visit to Jerusalem, backing their war on Iran

item.title: Protesters defy Berlin rain to call for end to global wars
item.description: Hundreds protested in Berlin against the US-Israeli aggression on Iran, and Israeli attacks on Gaza and Lebanon.

item.title: Trump says US seized Iranian ship trying to get past blockade near Hormuz
item.description: Iran vows retaliation, accuses US of violating ceasefire after attack on cargo ship Touska.

item.title: Did the US misjudge Iran? A military strategist answers
item.description: Strategist Bryan Clark examines shifting war aims, escalation traps, and whether Iran is now more dangerous to the US.

item.title: Iran and Israel: From friends to enemies
item.description: Israel and the US have been at war with Iran since Feb 28th. All sides have suffered, but it wasn’t always this way.

item.title: Israeli attacks on healthcare across Iran, Lebanon and Gaza
item.description: Israeli attacks on healthcare across Iran, Lebanon and Gaza

item.title: What would it take for the Iran-US talks to succeed?
item.description: Political scientist Mohsen Milani and former White House official Elisa Ewers discuss the options in Iran-US talks.

item.title: Met Police investigate potential Iran links to London arson attacks
item.description: The latest attack at a Jewish site in the UK capital occurs at Kenton United Synagogue and causes minor damage.

item.title: Eight children killed in Louisiana shooting, gunman fatally shot by police
item.description: Louisiana community in shock as domestic violence incident leaves eight children dead and two others injured.
